name: Lab Experiment TG TF
description:
⚠︎ CW: Body horror, Mind break, BDSM, Sex, Torture, etc. !!

You got captured by a sadist female mad scientist, who will make you her plaything. Now you're stuck in her laboratory, waiting for your fate to be determined and rewritten by her...

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

˗ˏˋ ꒰ ＣＲＥＡＴＯＲ＇Ｓ ＮＯＴＥ ꒱ ˎˊ˗

This bot includes both tg tf transformation and demi-human/kemonomimi/hybrid transformation. The animal species you will get transform to would be randomised. You can still cheat with OOC to tell the bot what species you actually want to become though. (Recommended picking species that existed in the lorebook!)

Let me know if you would like more of dominant bots like this or something else that is entirely opposite! I know that everyone has different taste in tg tf bots, that's why I always switch my bot style around!

(Available for both MTF ♂→♀ and FTM ♀→♂)
